untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern formation detection requires shape/geometric analysis not available in indicator set. Pattern identification (identification of diamond support/resistance points, pattern height/width ratios, tall vs short, wide vs narrow) cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Breakout proximity to yearly low requires historical price extrema lookup. Throwback/pullback avoidance requires multi-bar pattern context. Signal uses Donchian channels as proxy for breakout detection but true diamond pattern recognition requires custom pattern scanner.
translation_notes: Approximated using Donchian channel breakouts with volume confirmation as mechanical substitute for diamond pattern breakouts. Entry requires: breakout direction aligned with trend regime + volume confirmation. Exit set to 42 days (6 weeks as stated) or trend reversal via middle band cross. Stop loss set conservatively at 5%. This is a partial translation; production use requires dedicated diamond pattern detector.
